description_long: This object is a long, slender knife or sword with a straight, uniform blade and a minimalistic design. The blade appears to be double-edged and tapers slightly towards the tip, with no visible serrations or curvature. The handle is integrated seamlessly with the blade, lacking any distinct grip texture, pommel, or ergonomic shaping. There is no visible guard or crossguard separating the blade from the handle, giving the object a streamlined and utilitarian appearance. The entire object is a consistent metallic gray, suggesting it is made from a single piece of metal, likely stainless steel or a similar alloy. There are no visible decorative elements, engravings, or ornamentation on any part of the object.
description: A long, straight, double-edged metallic knife or sword with a seamless, minimalist design and no visible guard or ornamentation.
description_view_0: The object is seen from the side, showing its full length and straight, uniform profile.
description_view_1: The object is viewed from the end, revealing its thin, narrow edge and rectangular cross-section.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, again displaying the full length and straightness of the blade and handle.
description_view_3: The object is viewed from the opposite end, showing the same thin, narrow edge as view 1.
attribute_handle_design: straight, integrated, metallic, no visible grip texture or pommel
